summary: Iteration 42 testing complete. All 4 requested features verified: 1) StoresListPage has interactive Leaflet map with real OpenStreetMap tiles and store markers, 2) CertificatesListPage has compact grid with expandable detail popups, 3) ProductDetailPage shows 'Free shipping' badge with truck icon, 4) Producer Products form has shipping configuration fields (shipping_cost, free_shipping_min_qty).

issues: Some TEST_ products have broken image placeholders - test data issue, not a bug

passed_tests: StoresListPage: Interactive Leaflet map container loads correctly
StoresListPage: OpenStreetMap tiles load and display real map of Spain/Europe
StoresListPage: Zoom controls (+/-) present and functional
StoresListPage: Store markers visible on map (2 markers found)
StoresListPage: Toggle between grid and map view works ('Ver mapa' / 'View cards' button)
StoresListPage: Store cards display in sidebar when in map view
CertificatesListPage: Compact grid of product thumbnails displays correctly
CertificatesListPage: Cert count badges visible on each product (e.g., '2 certs', '3 certs')
CertificatesListPage: Click on product expands detail popup
CertificatesListPage: Expanded popup shows certification badges (vegan, gluten-free)
CertificatesListPage: 'Ver certificado completo' link in popup works
CertificatesListPage: Ingredients preview shown in expanded popup
ProductDetailPage: Shipping info section present in product info block
ProductDetailPage: 'Free shipping' badge with truck/package icon displays in green
ProductDetailPage: Shipping info shows correctly for products with no shipping cost
ProducerProducts: 'Configuración de Envío' section present in product form
ProducerProducts: 'Costo de Envío (€)' input field with placeholder '0.00 (gratis)'
ProducerProducts: 'Envío gratis desde (unidades)' input field with placeholder 'Ej: 3'
ProducerProducts: Helper text explains shipping options
critical_code_review_comments: StoresListPage.js: Leaflet integration is well-implemented with proper marker icons, zoom controls, and OpenStreetMap tiles
StoresListPage.js: City coordinates (CITY_COORDS) include real Spanish cities (Madrid, Barcelona, Sevilla, Valencia, etc.)
CertificatesListPage.js: Expandable popup implementation is clean with proper z-index handling
ProductDetailPage.js: Shipping info section properly checks for shipping_cost being null/0 to show 'Free shipping'
ProducerProducts.js: Shipping configuration fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified all new features: 1) StoresListPage now uses real Leaflet map with OpenStreetMap tiles instead of SVG - shows real Spain map with zoom controls and store markers. 2) CertificatesListPage has compact thumbnail grid with cert count badges, clicking expands detail popup with certifications list. 3) ProductDetailPage shows 'Free shipping' badge with truck icon in green when shipping_cost is null/0. 4) Producer Products form has 'Configuración de Envío' section with shipping_cost and free_shipping_min_qty fields.

leaflet_interactive_map.details: Real OpenStreetMap tiles, zoom controls, store markers, toggle between grid/map view

certificates_compact_grid.details: Thumbnail grid with cert count badges, expandable detail popup with certifications and ingredients

product_detail_shipping_info.details: 'Free shipping' badge with truck icon in green, shows in product info block

producer_shipping_form_fields.details: 'Costo de Envío' and 'Envío gratis desde' input fields with proper labels and placeholders
